canto_title: The Arrival of the Angels and the Encounter with the Malaspina

scenes.summary: As twilight falls, a female soul appears and sings a devout hymn to the Virgin Mary.
Two green-clad angels descend from the heavens, wielding broken, blunt swords.
The arrival of the angels causes the assembled group of souls to pause and watch with uncertainty.
Sordello explains the angels' mission to guard the valley against an approaching serpent and calls the group to descend.
Dante descends and encounters a noble judge who observes him with curiosity and warmth.
The judge asks Dante about his journey, and Dante reveals he has come from the world of the living.
The judge turns to call Currado and delivers a poignant message intended for his wife, Giovanna.
Dante observes the shifting stars in the sky and engages in a brief astronomical dialogue with Virgil.
A serpent creeps through the valley, prompting the angels to take flight and intercept the threat.
The soul revealed to be Currado Malaspina identifies himself and asks Dante for news of his homeland.
Dante offers high praise for the honor and integrity of the Malaspina family and their territory.
The judge concludes the encounter with a cryptic and authoritative instruction to move on.
